title: A Yonko Enters the Conversation

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ugh... this mountain region's so huge...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Oh, did you help out Nami?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: That's right! I want to be captain!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Then form an alliance with us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: ...to take down one of the Yonkou!!!

summary: A Yonko Enters the Conversation. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
